title: URAファイナルズ予選の後に

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! Congratulations on passing the
preliminaries!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume competing on the stage where they
can shine the brightest, their fans' expectations
on their backs...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The satisfaction on the faces of both the runners
and the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! This is truly what the URA Finale is all
about!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But the next race won't be so easy. You'll be up
against fellow veterans who've made it through
the preliminaries just like you. What do you say
to that?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Excellent! I look forward to a heated race!
